title: lantana venosa
intro: Lantana venosa, also known as the variegated lantana or lantana with veined leaves, is a species of flowering plant in the verbena family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, primarily as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing protection against insect bites and skin conditions. Lantana venosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can also be dried and used in herbal remedies.
